ValidationRule.errorConditionFormula: AND( NOT( $User.Bypass_Validation_Rules__c ), $RecordType.Id ='01220000000MLar', OR(ISBLANK( Number_of_items__c ),ISNULL( Number_of_items__c )) , OR( AND( TEXT( External_Case_Category__c )="Customer Support", TEXT( External_Case_Detail__c ) = "Quotation", OR( TEXT(External_description__c ) = "Initial", TEXT(External_description__c ) = "Revision" ) ), AND( TEXT( External_Case_Category__c )="Contract Support", OR( AND( OR( TEXT( External_Case_Detail__c ) = "Contract Modification Proposal", TEXT( External_Case_Detail__c ) = "Early Termination Proposal" ), OR( TEXT(External_description__c ) = "Initial", TEXT(External_description__c ) = "Revision" ) ), AND( OR( TEXT( External_Case_Detail__c ) = "Change of Conditions", TEXT( External_Case_Detail__c ) = "Lengthening" ), TEXT(External_description__c ) = "Offer" ) ) ) ) )
